ab: shitusi iaku tilha mriqaz naak a apura’in.
ch: 昨天，我去部落拜訪爺爺。
en: Yesterday, I went to visit my grandpa in the tribe.

ab: mathuaw mindaaq iaku antu minriqaz naak a apura’in, mathuaw iaku mangqtuqtu thithu.
ch: 我們很久沒有見面了，我很想念他。
en: We haven’t seen each other for a long time and I miss him a lot.

ab: naak a apura’in tu mriqaz iakin, pakaan iakin sharitunu numa piaqilha iakin pushawil.
ch: 爺爺一看到我，就請我吃木瓜，請我喝茶。
en: As soon as grandpa saw me, he invited me to papaya and drink tea.

ab: naak a apura’in pinalhuiza wa sharitunu mathuaw madahun, dadu mathuaw tauduu ya kaanin.
ch: 爺爺種的木瓜很甜，真的很好吃。
en: The papaya grown by grandpa is very sweet and really delicious.

ab: mathuaw iaku miku iqilha naak a apura’in a pushawil, mathuaw maqitan iqilhan.
ch: 我也喜歡爺爺的茶，也很好喝。
en: I also like grandpa’s tea, it’s tasted good too.

ab: ya saqazi, miasuun iaku naak a apuki’ay pinsaqazi iamin pit’ia.
ch: 中午的時候，我和奶奶一起煮午餐。
en: At noon, I cooked lunch with my grandma.

ab: mathuaw naak a apuki’ay pinsaqazi pit’ia manasha pania’an, ianan rusaw, ianan ranaw, ianan bahat, numa ianan mani riaz.
ch: 奶奶煮了很豐盛的午餐，有魚、有雞、有南瓜、還有河蚌。
en: Grandma cooked a big lunch, including fish, chicken, pumpkin, and clam.

ab: kminaaniza kunsaqazi, musui tamakuan iamin mara shanglaw.
ch: 吃完午餐後，我們去菜園摘菜。
en: After lunch, we went to the vegetable garden to pick vegetables.

ab: mathuaw naak a apuki’ay lhai iakin buna, lhari numa tilkun, kathu mutaun.
ch: 奶奶拿了很多地瓜、芋頭和蕗蕎給我，要我帶回家。
en: Grandma brought me a lot of sweet potatoes, taro and buckwheat, and asked me to take them home.

ab: zaik thaithuy amushaiza iaku mutaun, ya ishawananiza iaku amuqthaiza iaku musui mriqaz thaithuy.
ch: 我跟他們道別，說下次再去看他們。
en: I said goodbye to them and said I’d see them next time.
